scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../services/parser && npm install && cd ../embedder && npm install && cd ../skill-extractor && npm install && cd ../matcher && npm install && cd ../feedback && npm install && cd ../enhancer && npm install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:parser" "npm run dev:embedder" "npm run dev:matcher" "npm run dev:skills" "npm run dev:feedback" "npm run dev:enhancer"
